# dAppBooster

> dAppBooster is a free, open-source Web3 starter kit built with React that accelerates blockchain dApp development with wallet integration, multi-chain EVM support, and modular components.

## Overview

dAppBooster is a modern blockchain boilerplate that provides production-ready Web3 essentials out of the box. Developers can scaffold a new project in seconds using `pnpm dlx dappbooster` and immediately start building on any EVM-compatible chain.

Built by developers, for developers. From intuitive CLI tools to smooth local testing environments, everything is designed to remove friction and accelerate your workflow.

## Key Features

- Seamless wallet integration with ConnectKit, RainbowKit, and Web3Modal
- Multi-chain support for all EVM-compatible networks (Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, and more)
- Type-safe, auto-generated hooks for contract interactions and subgraph queries
- Modular, tree-shakable component library for common dApp patterns
- Scalable project structure for managing contracts, ABIs, and subgraphs
- CLI-based project scaffolding via `pnpm dlx dappbooster`

## Getting Started

Run `pnpm dlx dappbooster` in your terminal and follow the prompts. No prior Web3 experience required. dAppBooster is completely free and open-source with no licensing costs.
